p_named.text: Lily and the cat  became friends and they continued to play together in the park. They learned that not all cats look ugly and that helping others can make them happy.
Lily and the cat  played together every day. They ran and jumped and had so much fun. Lily loved spending time with her new friend.

Lily and the cat  played together for a while, chasing each other and having fun. When it was time for Lily to go home, she said goodbye to the cat and thanked it for playing with her. The cat meowed sadly and walked away, but Lily knew that she would see it again soon.

Lily and the cat  went to the park together. They played on the swings and had a picnic. When it was time to go home, they said goodbye. Lily went home with a big smile on her face. She couldn't wait to play in the park again.
Lily and the cat  went home, happy and content. They knew that they would always remember the beautiful cat and their wonderful walk in the park.
